pages.text: Natural uranium contains only a small amount of fissile U-235. To make efficient fuel, you must enrich it. $(br2)First, process Uranium and Fluorite into $(l:unnamednuclear:uranium_hexafluoride)Uranium Hexafluoride$. Then, place it in an $(l:unnamednuclear:centrifuge)Isotope Centrifuge$ to increase the U-235 concentration.
